title: Youtube Poop: Inaccuracies In Youtube Poops
description:
Here is where I have compiled many errors in the clips used to make Youtube Poops. If you feel that some of my criticism is incorrect, just be quiet about it, or you'll find yourself swimming with the fishes. 

ANOTHER THING: SMOKE IS STEAM! IT IS I TELLS YA! Do you think my point would be better proved if I had only 3 or 4 instances of smoke without fire??? NO! So just shaddap!

I might make a 2nd one if I get enough inaccuracies. Keep those comments coming, you guys; your comment just might make the list!
